site.name: TanyaMuch Wellness
site.tagline: Your mental health is our concern.
site.footer_copy: © 2026 TanyaMuch Wellness Mental Clinic. 1074 Cnr Masotsha Ndhlovu/6th Avenue, Parktown, Waterfalls, Harare, Zimbabwe

contact.address: 1074 Cnr Masotsha Ndhlovu/6th Avenue, Parktown, Waterfalls, Harare, Zimbabwe

hero.tag: Now accepting new clients — Waterfalls, Harare
hero.subtext: Do not suffer in silence. Come and share — we listen. Professional, ethically sound, and evidence-based psychological services in the heart of Harare.

services.title: Individual Counselling
services.description: One-on-one sessions tailored to your unique challenges — from anxiety and career decisions to fear, mood swings, and life transitions.

services.title: Couples & Relationship Therapy
services.description: Rebuild trust, improve communication, and heal together. We guide couples through conflict, disconnection, and growth.

services.title: Depression Therapy
services.description: Because even the strongest need someone to talk to. We help you rediscover purpose, joy, and emotional balance.

services.title: Marital Counselling
services.description: Strengthen your marriage with professional guidance. Navigate challenges with clarity, empathy, and renewed commitment.

services.title: Trauma & Grief Counselling
services.description: Process loss, trauma, and difficult life events in a safe, non-judgmental space with compassionate professional support.

services.title: Personal Growth & Wellness
services.description: Even without a crisis, therapy helps. Build resilience, self-awareness, and the tools to live your best life.

why.heading: Care that goes beyond the session
why.body: We believe mental healthcare should be accessible, dignified, and genuinely transformative. Every client who walks through our doors is seen, heard, and met with unconditional professional care.

points.title: Ethically Sound Practice
points.body: All our services adhere to the highest professional and ethical standards in psychological care.

points.title: Evidence-Based Methods
points.body: We use clinically proven therapeutic approaches, not guesswork. Real results grounded in research.

points.title: Safe & Confidential Space
points.body: What you share stays with us. Your privacy and emotional safety are our foremost priority.

steps.title: Initial Consultation
steps.body: A warm, judgment-free conversation to understand your needs and set the right therapeutic direction.

steps.title: Personalised Plan
steps.body: We craft a tailored therapy plan aligned with your specific goals, challenges, and circumstances.

steps.title: Ongoing Sessions
steps.body: Consistent, meaningful sessions where real healing and transformation take place.

steps.title: Growth & Flourishing
steps.body: We walk with you until you have the tools, confidence, and clarity to thrive independently.

testimonials.text: I walked in feeling completely broken. The team at TanyaMuch Wellness gave me a safe space to fall apart — and then helped me rebuild, stronger than ever. I am genuinely grateful.
testimonials.name: — Anonymous Client

cta.heading: Ready to take the first step?
cta.body: You don't have to face this alone. Reach out today — no judgment, just compassionate professional support.
